1	package tui
2	
3	// Screen identifies which sub-model the Root should be showing.
4	type Screen int
5	
6	const (
7		ScreenMainMenu Screen = iota
8		ScreenBoardList
9		ScreenBoardView
10		ScreenArticleView
11		ScreenPostCompose
12		ScreenWBInbox
13		ScreenWBCompose
14	)
15	
16	// NavigateMsg is emitted by sub-screens to ask the Root to swap screens.
17	// Optional fields carry context the destination screen needs.
18	type NavigateMsg struct {
19		To        Screen
20		BoardID   int64
21		ArticleID int64
22		Recipient string // for ScreenWBCompose: prefilled recipient userid
23	}
24	
25	// ErrorMsg surfaces an error as a transient toast.
26	type ErrorMsg struct{ Err error }
27	
28	// WBIncomingMsg is delivered by the chat broker (or replayed from DB on Init)
29	// to notify the recipient that a new water balloon arrived.
30	type WBIncomingMsg struct {
31		ID         int64
32		FromUserID string
33		Body       string
34	}
35	
36	// PushAddedMsg is broadcast by the chat broker when a push is added to an
37	// article. The article-view model checks ArticleID to decide whether to
38	// re-render.
39	type PushAddedMsg struct {
40		ArticleID  int64
41		UserUserID string
42		Kind       string
43		Body       string
44	}
45

 `./internal/tui/root.go`

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"time"
6	
7		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
8	
9		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/chat"
10		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
11	)
12	
13	// Deps bundles everything every screen may need. Pass-by-value into
14	// constructors keeps screens self-contained.
15	type Deps struct {
16		Store      *store.Store
17		Broker     *chat.Broker // nil during register
18		User       *store.User  // nil iff IsRegister
19		IsRegister bool
20	}
21	
22	// Root is the top-level tea.Model. It owns the active sub-model and
23	// handles cross-cutting concerns: window size, global hotkeys, navigation,
24	// and the toast footer.
25	type Root struct {
26		deps   Deps
27		sub    tea.Model
28		width  int
29		height int
30	
31		toast      string
32		toastUntil time.Time
33	}
34	
35	const toastDuration = 3 * time.Second
36	
37	// NewRoot builds the Root with the right initial sub-screen.
38	func NewRoot(deps Deps) Root {
39		r := Root{deps: deps}
40		if deps.IsRegister {
41			r.sub = newRegisterModel(deps)
42		} else {
43			r.sub = newMainMenuModel(deps)
44		}
45		return r
46	}
47	
48	func (m Root) Init() tea.Cmd {
49		return m.sub.Init()
50	}
51	
52	func (m Root) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
53		switch msg := msg.(type) {
54		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
55			m.width = msg.Width
56			m.height = msg.Height
57			var cmd tea.Cmd
58			m.sub, cmd = m.sub.Update(msg)
59			return m, cmd
60	
61		case tea.KeyMsg:
62			// Global ctrl+c always quits.
63			if msg.String() == "ctrl+c" {
64				return m, tea.Quit
65			}
66			// Global Ctrl+U opens water balloon inbox (logged-in only).
67			if msg.String() == "ctrl+u" && !m.deps.IsRegister {
68				return m.navigate(NavigateMsg{To: ScreenWBInbox})
69			}
70	
71		case NavigateMsg:
72			return m.navigate(msg)
73	
74		case ErrorMsg:
75			if msg.Err != nil {
76				m.setToast("⚠ " + msg.Err.Error())
77			}
78			return m, nil
79	
80		case WBIncomingMsg:
81			m.setToast("💧 " + msg.FromUserID + ": " + msg.Body)
82			// Mark this WB as read so it doesn't replay on reconnect.
83			if m.deps.Store != nil && msg.ID != 0 {
84				go func(id int64) {
85					_ = m.deps.Store.WaterBalloons().MarkRead(context.Background(), id)
86				}(msg.ID)
87			}
88			// fall through so the active screen can also react
89		}
90	
91		var cmd tea.Cmd
92		m.sub, cmd = m.sub.Update(msg)
93		return m, cmd
94	}
95	
96	func (m Root) View() string {
97		v := m.sub.View()
98		if m.toast != "" && time.Now().Before(m.toastUntil) {
99			v += "\n" + StyleToast.Render(m.toast)
100		}
101		return v
102	}
103	
104	func (m *Root) setToast(s string) {
105		m.toast = s
106		m.toastUntil = time.Now().Add(toastDuration)
107	}
108	
109	func (m Root) navigate(n NavigateMsg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
110		var sub tea.Model
111		switch n.To {
112		case ScreenMainMenu:
113			sub = newMainMenuModel(m.deps)
114		case ScreenBoardList:
115			sub = newBoardListModel(m.deps)
116		case ScreenBoardView:
117			sub = newBoardViewModel(m.deps, n.BoardID)
118		case ScreenArticleView:
119			sub = newArticleViewModel(m.deps, n.ArticleID)
120		case ScreenPostCompose:
121			sub = newPostComposeModel(m.deps, n.BoardID)
122		case ScreenWBInbox:
123			sub = newWBInboxModel(m.deps)
124		case ScreenWBCompose:
125			sub = newWBComposeModel(m.deps, n.Recipient)
126		default:
127			// Unknown screen — leave sub untouched. Later steps add cases.
128			return m, nil
129		}
130		m.sub = sub
131		cmd := sub.Init()
132		if m.width > 0 {
133			// Forward current size to the new sub so it can lay out immediately.
134			var cmd2 tea.Cmd
135			m.sub, cmd2 = m.sub.Update(tea.WindowSizeMsg{Width: m.width, Height: m.height})
136			if cmd2 != nil {
137				cmd = tea.Batch(cmd, cmd2)
138			}
139		}
140		return m, cmd
141	}
142
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"fmt"
6		"strings"
7	
8		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textinput"
9		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
10	
11		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
12	)
13	
14	type articleViewModel struct {
15		deps    Deps
16		article *store.Article
17		pushes  []*store.Push
18		width   int
19		height  int
20		scroll  int
21		loadErr error
22	
23		// push input state
24		pushing  bool
25		pushKind store.PushKind
26		pushIn   textinput.Model
27		err      string
28	}
29	
30	func newArticleViewModel(deps Deps, articleID int64) articleViewModel {
31		ctx := context.Background()
32		a, err := deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(ctx, articleID)
33		if err != nil {
34			return articleViewModel{deps: deps, loadErr: err}
35		}
36		pushes, err := deps.Store.Pushes().ListByArticle(ctx, articleID)
37	
38		ti := textinput.New()
39		ti.Placeholder = "comment…"
40		ti.CharLimit = 80
41		ti.Width = 60
42	
43		return articleViewModel{deps: deps, article: a, pushes: pushes, loadErr: err, pushIn: ti}
44	}
45	
46	func (m articleViewModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }
47	
48	func (m articleViewModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
49		switch msg := msg.(type) {
50		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
51			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
52			return m, nil
53	
54		case PushAddedMsg:
55			if m.article != nil && msg.ArticleID == m.article.ID {
56				ctx := context.Background()
57				// Re-fetch from DB so timestamps and recommend_score reflect
58				// the canonical state, not the just-synthesized broker payload.
59				if pushes, err := m.deps.Store.Pushes().ListByArticle(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
60					m.pushes = pushes
61				}
62				if a, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
63					m.article = a
64				}
65			}
66			return m, nil
67	
68		case tea.KeyMsg:
69			if m.pushing {
70				return m.updatePushInput(msg)
71			}
72			switch msg.String() {
73			case "esc", "backspace", "left", "h":
74				boardID := int64(0)
75				if m.article != nil {
76					boardID = m.article.BoardID
77				}
78				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardView, BoardID: boardID} }
79			case "up", "k":
80				if m.scroll > 0 {
81					m.scroll--
82				}
83			case "down", "j":
84				m.scroll++
85			case "pgup", "b":
86				m.scroll = max(0, m.scroll-10)
87			case "pgdown", " ":
88				m.scroll += 10
89			case "+":
90				return m.openPush(store.PushKindPush), nil
91			case "-":
92				return m.openPush(store.PushKindBoo), nil
93			case "=":
94				return m.openPush(store.PushKindArrow), nil
95			}
96		}
97		return m, nil
98	}
99	
100	func (m articleViewModel) openPush(k store.PushKind) tea.Model {
101		m.pushing = true
102		m.pushKind = k
103		m.pushIn.SetValue("")
104		m.pushIn.Focus()
105		m.err = ""
106		return m
107	}
108	
109	func (m articleViewModel) updatePushInput(msg tea.KeyMsg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
110		switch msg.String() {
111		case "esc":
112			m.pushing = false
113			m.pushIn.Blur()
114			return m, nil
115		case "enter":
116			body := strings.TrimSpace(m.pushIn.Value())
117			if body == "" && m.pushKind != store.PushKindArrow {
118				m.err = "comment required for 推/噓"
119				return m, nil
120			}
121			ctx := context.Background()
122			u := m.deps.User
123			p, err := m.deps.Store.Pushes().Create(ctx, m.article.ID, u.ID, u.UserID, m.pushKind, body)
124			if err != nil {
125				m.err = err.Error()
126				return m, nil
127			}
128			// Append locally so the originator sees it immediately.
129			m.pushes = append(m.pushes, p)
130			if a, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
131				m.article = a
132			}
133			m.pushing = false
134			m.pushIn.Blur()
135			// Broadcast to other live sessions; they filter by ArticleID.
136			if m.deps.Broker != nil {
137				m.deps.Broker.SendToAll(u.ID, PushAddedMsg{
138					ArticleID:  m.article.ID,
139					UserUserID: u.UserID,
140					Kind:       string(m.pushKind),
141					Body:       body,
142				})
143			}
144			return m, nil
145		}
146		var cmd tea.Cmd
147		m.pushIn, cmd = m.pushIn.Update(msg)
148		return m, cmd
149	}
150	
151	func (m articleViewModel) View() string {
152		if m.loadErr != nil {
153			return "\n  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n"
154		}
155		if m.article == nil {
156			return "\n  " + StyleDim.Render("(no article)") + "\n"
157		}
158		a := m.article
159	
160		var b strings.Builder
161		b.WriteString("\n")
162		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" 文章 #%d · %s ", a.ID, a.AuthorUserID)))
163		b.WriteString("\n\n")
164	
165		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Title: ") + a.Title + "\n")
166		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Date:  ") + a.CreatedAt.Format("2006-01-02 15:04:05") + "\n")
167		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Score: ") + fmt.Sprintf("%d", a.RecommendScore) + "\n")
168		b.WriteString("\n")
169	
170		bodyLines := strings.Split(a.Body, "\n")
171		start := min(m.scroll, len(bodyLines))
172		maxLines := max(m.height-16, 5)
173		end := min(start+maxLines, len(bodyLines))
174		for _, line := range bodyLines[start:end] {
175			b.WriteString("  " + line + "\n")
176		}
177		if start > 0 || end < len(bodyLines) {
178			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(fmt.Sprintf("[lines %d-%d / %d]", start+1, end, len(bodyLines))))
179			b.WriteString("\n")
180		}
181	
182		if len(m.pushes) > 0 {
183			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleDim.Render(fmt.Sprintf("── 推文 (%d) ──", len(m.pushes))) + "\n")
184			for _, p := range m.pushes {
185				ts := p.CreatedAt.Format("01/02 15:04")
186				line := fmt.Sprintf("  %s %s %s  %s",
187					renderPushKind(p.Kind),
188					PadRight(p.UserUserID, 14),
189					p.Body,
190					StyleDim.Render(ts),
191				)
192				b.WriteString(line + "\n")
193			}
194		}
195	
196		if m.pushing {
197			b.WriteString("\n  ")
198			b.WriteString(renderPushKind(m.pushKind) + " ")
199			b.WriteString(m.pushIn.View())
200			b.WriteString("\n")
201			if m.err != "" {
202				b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.err) + "\n")
203			}
204			b.WriteString("  " + StyleHelp.Render("Enter send · Esc cancel"))
205		} else {
206			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("j/k scroll · + 推 · - 噓 · = → · Esc/← back · Ctrl+C disconnect"))
207		}
208		b.WriteString("\n")
209		return b.String()
210	}
211	
212	func renderPushKind(k store.PushKind) string {
213		switch k {
214		case store.PushKindPush:
215			return StylePushKind.Render("推")
216		case store.PushKindBoo:
217			return StyleBooKind.Render("噓")
218		case store.PushKindArrow:
219			return StyleArrowKind.Render("→")
220		}
221		return "?"
222	}
223
```

19		cursor int
20	}
21	
22	func newMainMenuModel(deps Deps) mainMenuModel {
23		return mainMenuModel{
24			deps: deps,
25			items: []menuItem{
26				{label: "看板列表 Boards", hint: "browse and read articles", to: ScreenBoardList},
27				{label: "水球 Water Balloons", hint: "private messages with online users", to: ScreenWBInbox},
28				{label: "離線 Quit", hint: "disconnect", to: -1},
29			},
30		}
31	}
32	
33	func (m mainMenuModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }
34	
35	func (m mainMenuModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
36		if k, ok := msg.(tea.KeyMsg); ok {
37			switch k.String() {
38			case "q", "esc":
39				return m, tea.Quit
40			case "up", "k":
41				if m.cursor > 0 {
42					m.cursor--
43				}
44				return m, nil
45			case "down", "j":
46				if m.cursor < len(m.items)-1 {
47					m.cursor++
48				}
49				return m, nil
50			case "enter", " ", "right", "l":
51				it := m.items[m.cursor]
52				if it.to == -1 {
53					return m, tea.Quit
54				}
55				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: it.to} }
56			case "1", "2", "3":
57				idx := int(k.String()[0] - '1')
58				if idx < len(m.items) {
59					it := m.items[idx]
60					if it.to == -1 {
61						return m, tea.Quit
62					}
63					return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: it.to} }
64				}
65			}
66		}
67		return m, nil
68	}
69	
70	func (m mainMenuModel) View() string {
71		u := m.deps.User
72		nick := u.Nickname
73		if nick == "" {
74			nick = u.UserID
75		}
76	
77		var b strings.Builder
78		b.WriteString("\n")
79		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" SSH-BBS · %s (%s) ", nick, u.UserID)))
80		b.WriteString("\n\n")
81	
82		if u.LastLoginAt.Valid {
83			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(fmt.Sprintf("上次登入 %s · 累計登入 %d 次 · 發文 %d 篇",
84				u.LastLoginAt.Time.Format("2006-01-02 15:04"),
85				u.NumLogins,
86				u.NumPosts,
87			)))
88			b.WriteString("\n\n")
89		}
90	
91		b.WriteString("  ")
92		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 主選單 Main Menu "))
93		b.WriteString("\n\n")
94	
95		for i, it := range m.items {
96			marker := "  "
97			row := fmt.Sprintf("  %d. %s", i+1, it.label)
98			if i == m.cursor {
99				marker = "▸ "
100				row = StyleHighlight.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" %d. %-32s ", i+1, it.label))
101			}
102			b.WriteString(marker + row)
103			if it.hint != "" {
104				b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(it.hint))
105			}
106			b.WriteString("\n")
107		}
108	
109		b.WriteString("\n  ")
110		b.WriteString(StyleHelp.Render("↑/↓ j/k move · Enter/→/l choose · 1-3 jump · q quit"))
111		b.WriteString("\n")
112		return b.String()
113	}
114

## Territory Map: Chat Broker, Broadcast Pattern & Post Compose Flow

### 1. **Broker API** — `/Volumes/Data/Program/tries/2026-04-29-ssh-bbs/internal/chat/broker.go`

**Signatures:**
- **`Send(toUID int64, msg tea.Msg) bool`** (line 71): Delivers msg to all live sessions of a user; returns true if ≥1 session received it.
- **`SendToAll(excludeUID int64, msg tea.Msg)`** (line 83): Broadcasts to every online session except the originator (pass 0 to include sender).
- **`Register(s *Session)`** (line 45): Adds a session to the broker's registry.
- **`Unregister(userID int64, prog Sender)`** (line 54): Removes a single session; deletes user from online list when last session closes.
- **`OnlineList() []OnlineUser`** (line 111): Returns slice of `OnlineUser` structs (line 30).
- **`LookupByUserID(name string) int64`** (line 98): Case-insensitive lookup of numeric user ID by username; returns 0 if offline.

**Sender interface** (line 16):
```go
type Sender interface {
    Send(tea.Msg)
}
```

**Messages currently flowing:**
- `PushAddedMsg` — defined in `internal/tui/messages.go` (line 39), carries `ArticleID`, `UserUserID`, `Kind`, `Body`.
- `WBIncomingMsg` — water balloon arrival notification (line 30 of messages.go).

}

**Receiver pattern** (lines 54–66):
```go

            m.pushes = pushes
        }
        if a, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
            m.article = a
        }
    }
```
Filters by `ArticleID`, re-fetches pushes and article from DB to get canonical timestamps/scores.

### 3. **Post Compose Flow** — `/Volumes/Data/Program/tries/2026-04-29-ssh-bbs/internal/tui/screen_post_compose.go`

**`submit()` function** (lines 101–124):
```go
func (m postComposeModel) submit() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
    title := strings.TrimSpace(m.title.Value())
    body := m.body.Value()
    if title == "" {
        m.err = "title is required"
        return m, nil
    }
    if strings.TrimSpace(body) == "" {
        m.err = "body is required"
        return m, nil
    }
    ctx := context.Background()
    u := m.deps.User
    _, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().Create(ctx, m.boardID, u.ID, u.UserID, title, body)
    if err != nil {
        m.err = err.Error()
        return m, nil
    }
    if err := m.deps.Store.Users().IncrementPosts(ctx, u.ID); err != nil {
        m.err = err.Error()
        return m, nil
    }
    return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardView, BoardID: m.boardID} }
}
```

1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"fmt"

8		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"

11	)
12	
13	type boardViewModel struct {
14		deps     Deps
15		board    *store.Board
16		articles []*store.Article
17		cursor   int
18		width    int
19		height   int
20		loadErr  error
21	}
22	
23	func newBoardViewModel(deps Deps, boardID int64) boardViewModel {
24		ctx := context.Background()
25		board, err := deps.Store.Boards().GetByID(ctx, boardID)
26		if err != nil {
27			return boardViewModel{deps: deps, loadErr: err}
28		}
29		articles, err := deps.Store.Articles().ListByBoard(ctx, boardID, 100)
30		return boardViewModel{deps: deps, board: board, articles: articles, loadErr: err}
31	}
32	
33	func (m boardViewModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }
34	
35	func (m boardViewModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
36		switch msg := msg.(type) {
37		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
38			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
39			return m, nil
40		case tea.KeyMsg:
41			switch msg.String() {
42			case "esc", "backspace", "left", "h":
43				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardList} }
44			case "up", "k":
45				if m.cursor > 0 {
46					m.cursor--
47				}
48			case "down", "j":
49				if m.cursor < len(m.articles)-1 {
50					m.cursor++
51				}
52			case "home", "g":
53				m.cursor = 0
54			case "end", "G":
55				if len(m.articles) > 0 {
56					m.cursor = len(m.articles) - 1
57				}
58			case "enter", " ", "right", "l":
59				if len(m.articles) == 0 {
60					return m, nil
61				}
62				a := m.articles[m.cursor]
63				return m, func() tea.Msg {
64					return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenArticleView, ArticleID: a.ID, BoardID: a.BoardID}
65				}
66			case "p":
67				if m.board == nil {
68					return m, nil
69				}
70				return m, func() tea.Msg {
71					return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenPostCompose, BoardID: m.board.ID}
72				}
73			}
74		}
75		return m, nil
76	}
77	
78	func (m boardViewModel) View() string {
79		var b strings.Builder
80		b.WriteString("\n")
81		if m.board != nil {
82			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" 看板 %s · %s ", m.board.Name, m.board.Title)))
83		} else {
84			b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 看板 "))
85		}
86		b.WriteString("\n\n")
87	
88		if m.loadErr != nil {
89			b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n")
90			return b.String()
91		}
92		if len(m.articles) == 0 {
93			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("(no articles yet — press p to write one)") + "\n")
94			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("p post · Esc/←/h back · Ctrl+C disconnect"))
95			return b.String()
96		}
97	
98		const (
99			idxW    = 4
100			dateW   = 11
101			scoreW  = 4
102			authorW = 14
103		)
104		titleW := max(20, m.width-2-idxW-1-dateW-1-scoreW-1-authorW-2)
105		header := fmt.Sprintf(" %s  %s  %s  %s  %s",
106			PadRight("#", idxW),
107			PadRight("Date", dateW),
108			PadRight("Sc.", scoreW),
109			PadRight("Author", authorW),
110			PadRight("Title", titleW),
111		)
112		b.WriteString(StyleDim.Render(header) + "\n")
113	
114		for i, a := range m.articles {
115			score := ""
116			switch {
117			case a.RecommendScore >= 100:
118				score = "爆"
119			case a.RecommendScore > 0:
120				score = fmt.Sprintf("%d", a.RecommendScore)
121			case a.RecommendScore < 0:
122				score = "X" + fmt.Sprintf("%d", -a.RecommendScore)
123			}
124			row := fmt.Sprintf(" %s  %s  %s  %s  %s",
125				PadRight(fmt.Sprintf("%d", i+1), idxW),
126				PadRight(a.CreatedAt.Format("01/02 15:04"), dateW),
127				PadRight(score, scoreW),
128				PadRight(a.AuthorUserID, authorW),
129				Truncate(a.Title, titleW),
130			)
131			if i == m.cursor {
132				b.WriteString(StyleHighlight.Render("▸"+row[1:]) + "\n")
133			} else {
134				b.WriteString(" " + row + "\n")
135			}
136		}
137	
138		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("↑/↓ j/k move · Enter/→/l open · p post · Esc/←/h back · Ctrl+C disconnect"))
139		b.WriteString("\n")
140		return b.String()
141	}
142

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"testing"
5	
6		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
7	
8		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
9	)
10	
11	// keyOf builds a tea.KeyMsg whose .String() matches the wanted form.
12	// bubbletea exposes typed key constants; we use Runes for ASCII letters
13	// and named Type values for special keys.
14	func keyOf(s string) tea.KeyMsg {
15		switch s {
16		case "enter":
17			return tea.KeyMsg{Type: tea.KeyEnter}
18		case "esc":
19			return tea.KeyMsg{Type: tea.KeyEsc}
20		case "left":
21			return tea.KeyMsg{Type: tea.KeyLeft}
22		case "right":
23			return tea.KeyMsg{Type: tea.KeyRight}
24		case "up":
25			return tea.KeyMsg{Type: tea.KeyUp}
26		case "down":
27			return tea.KeyMsg{Type: tea.KeyDown}
28		case "backspace":
29			return tea.KeyMsg{Type: tea.KeyBackspace}
30		case "ctrl+u":
31			return tea.KeyMsg{Type: tea.KeyCtrlU}
32		case "ctrl+c":
33			return tea.KeyMsg{Type: tea.KeyCtrlC}
34		case " ":
35			return tea.KeyMsg{Type: tea.KeySpace}
36		}
37		return tea.KeyMsg{Type: tea.KeyRunes, Runes: []rune(s)}
38	}
39	
40	// runCmd invokes the tea.Cmd returned by Update and returns the resulting
41	// tea.Msg (or nil if cmd is nil).
42	func runCmd(cmd tea.Cmd) tea.Msg {
43		if cmd == nil {
44			return nil
45		}
46		return cmd()
47	}

1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"fmt"
6		"strings"
7	
8		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
9	
10		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
11	)
12	
13	type boardListModel struct {
14		deps    Deps
15		boards  []*store.Board
16		cursor  int
17		width   int
18		height  int
19		loadErr error
20	}
21	
22	func newBoardListModel(deps Deps) boardListModel {
23		boards, err := deps.Store.Boards().List(context.Background())
24		return boardListModel{deps: deps, boards: boards, loadErr: err}
25	}
26	
27	func (m boardListModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }
28	
29	func (m boardListModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
30		switch msg := msg.(type) {
31		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
32			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
33			return m, nil
34		case tea.KeyMsg:
35			switch msg.String() {
36			case "esc", "backspace", "left", "h":
37				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenMainMenu} }
38			case "up", "k":
39				if m.cursor > 0 {
40					m.cursor--
41				}
42			case "down", "j":
43				if m.cursor < len(m.boards)-1 {
44					m.cursor++
45				}
46			case "home", "g":
47				m.cursor = 0
48			case "end", "G":
49				if len(m.boards) > 0 {
50					m.cursor = len(m.boards) - 1
51				}
52			case "enter", " ", "right", "l":
53				if len(m.boards) == 0 {
54					return m, nil
55				}
56				b := m.boards[m.cursor]
57				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardView, BoardID: b.ID} }
58			}
59		}
60		return m, nil
61	}
62	
63	func (m boardListModel) View() string {
64		var b strings.Builder
65		b.WriteString("\n")
66		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 看板列表 Boards "))
67		b.WriteString("\n\n")
68	
69		if m.loadErr != nil {
70			b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ load failed: "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n")
71			return b.String()
72		}
73		if len(m.boards) == 0 {
74			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("(no boards yet)") + "\n")
75			return b.String()
76		}
77	
78		const (
79			nameW    = 14
80			titleW   = 32
81		)
82		header := fmt.Sprintf("  %s  %s  %s",
83			PadRight("Name", nameW),
84			PadRight("Title", titleW),
85			"Description",
86		)
87		b.WriteString(StyleDim.Render(header) + "\n")
88	
89		for i, br := range m.boards {
90			row := fmt.Sprintf("  %s  %s  %s",
91				PadRight(br.Name, nameW),
92				PadRight(br.Title, titleW),
93				Truncate(br.Description, max(20, m.width-nameW-titleW-8)),
94			)
95			if i == m.cursor {
96				b.WriteString(StyleHighlight.Render("▸"+row[1:]) + "\n")
97			} else {
98				b.WriteString(" " + row + "\n")
99			}
100		}
101	
102		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("↑/↓ j/k move · Enter/→/l open · Esc/←/h back · Ctrl+C disconnect"))
103		b.WriteString("\n")
104		return b.String()
105	}
106

98	func contains(s, sub string) bool {

102	func indexOf(s, sub string) int {

104			if s[i:i+len(sub)] == sub {
105				return i
106			}
107		}
108		return -1

 `./internal/chat/broker.go`

```text
1	// Package chat is the in-memory hub that connects live SSH sessions for
2	// real-time features (water balloons, push broadcasts). It mirrors PTT's
3	// `userinfo_t` shared-memory table conceptually, but as a process-local
4	// map[user_id][]*Session — no SHM, no daemons.
5	package chat
6	
7	import (
8		"sync"
9	
10		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
11	)
12	
13	// Sender is the minimal slice of *tea.Program the broker actually needs.
14	// Decoupling lets tests substitute a recording fake without spinning up a
15	// real bubbletea program.
16	type Sender interface {
17		Send(tea.Msg)
18	}
19	
20	// Session is one live SSH connection. The same user may have multiple
21	// Sessions (PTT calls this "雙開"); the broker keeps them all and
22	// broadcasts to each.
23	type Session struct {
24		UserID    int64
25		UserIDStr string
26		Program   Sender
27	}
28	
29	// OnlineUser is the externally-visible view of a logged-in user.
30	type OnlineUser struct {
31		UserID    int64
32		UserIDStr string
33		Sessions  int
34	}
35	
36	type Broker struct {
37		mu       sync.RWMutex
38		sessions map[int64][]*Session
39	}
40	
41	func NewBroker() *Broker {
42		return &Broker{sessions: make(map[int64][]*Session)}
43	}
44	
45	func (b *Broker) Register(s *Session) {
46		b.mu.Lock()
47		defer b.mu.Unlock()
48		b.sessions[s.UserID] = append(b.sessions[s.UserID], s)
49	}
50	
51	// Unregister removes a single session for the given user (matched by
52	// Sender identity). If it was the last session, the user disappears from
53	// the online list.
54	func (b *Broker) Unregister(userID int64, prog Sender) {
55		b.mu.Lock()
56		defer b.mu.Unlock()
57		list := b.sessions[userID]
58		for i, s := range list {
59			if s.Program == prog {
60				b.sessions[userID] = append(list[:i], list[i+1:]...)
61				break
62			}
63		}
64		if len(b.sessions[userID]) == 0 {
65			delete(b.sessions, userID)
66		}
67	}
68	
69	// Send delivers msg to every live session of toUID. Returns true if at
70	// least one session received it (i.e. the recipient is online).
71	func (b *Broker) Send(toUID int64, msg tea.Msg) bool {
72		b.mu.RLock()
73		defer b.mu.RUnlock()
74		list := b.sessions[toUID]
75		for _, s := range list {
76			s.Program.Send(msg)
77		}
78		return len(list) > 0
79	}
80	
81	// SendToAll broadcasts to every online session. excludeUID lets the
82	// originator skip themselves (pass 0 to broadcast to everyone).
83	func (b *Broker) SendToAll(excludeUID int64, msg tea.Msg) {
84		b.mu.RLock()
85		defer b.mu.RUnlock()
86		for uid, list := range b.sessions {
87			if uid == excludeUID {
88				continue
89			}
90			for _, s := range list {
91				s.Program.Send(msg)
92			}
93		}
94	}
95	
96	// LookupByUserID returns the numeric user_id for a logged-in account name,
97	// or 0 if nobody by that name is currently online. Case-insensitive.
98	func (b *Broker) LookupByUserID(name string) int64 {
99		b.mu.RLock()
100		defer b.mu.RUnlock()
101		for uid, list := range b.sessions {
102			for _, s := range list {
103				if equalFold(s.UserIDStr, name) {
104					return uid
105				}
106			}
107		}
108		return 0
109	}
110	
111	func (b *Broker) OnlineList() []OnlineUser {
112		b.mu.RLock()
113		defer b.mu.RUnlock()
114		out := make([]OnlineUser, 0, len(b.sessions))
115		for uid, list := range b.sessions {
116			if len(list) == 0 {
117				continue
118			}
119			out = append(out, OnlineUser{
120				UserID:    uid,
121				UserIDStr: list[0].UserIDStr,
122				Sessions:  len(list),
123			})
124		}
125		return out
126	}
127	
128	// SessionsSnapshot returns a defensive copy of every session pointer for
129	// graceful shutdown (so the caller can iterate without holding the lock
130	// while blocking on per-program quits).
131	func (b *Broker) SessionsSnapshot() []*Session {
132		b.mu.RLock()
133		defer b.mu.RUnlock()
134		var out []*Session
135		for _, list := range b.sessions {
136			out = append(out, list...)
137		}
138		return out
139	}
140	
141	// equalFold is strings.EqualFold inlined to avoid the import in this tiny package.
142	func equalFold(a, b string) bool {
143		if len(a) != len(b) {
144			return false
145		}
146		for i := 0; i < len(a); i++ {
147			ca, cb := a[i], b[i]
148			if ca >= 'A' && ca <= 'Z' {
149				ca += 32
150			}
151			if cb >= 'A' && cb <= 'Z' {
152				cb += 32
153			}
154			if ca != cb {
155				return false
156			}
157		}
158		return true
159	}
160

1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"fmt"
6		"strings"
7	
8		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textinput"
9		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
10	
11		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
12	)
13	
14	type articleViewModel struct {
15		deps    Deps
16		article *store.Article
17		pushes  []*store.Push
18		width   int
19		height  int
20		scroll  int
21		loadErr error
22	
23		// push input state
24		pushing  bool
25		pushKind store.PushKind
26		pushIn   textinput.Model
27		err      string
28	}
29	
30	func newArticleViewModel(deps Deps, articleID int64) articleViewModel {
31		ctx := context.Background()
32		a, err := deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(ctx, articleID)
33		if err != nil {
34			return articleViewModel{deps: deps, loadErr: err}
35		}
36		pushes, err := deps.Store.Pushes().ListByArticle(ctx, articleID)
37	
38		ti := textinput.New()
39		ti.Placeholder = "comment…"
40		ti.CharLimit = 80
41		ti.Width = 60
42	
43		return articleViewModel{deps: deps, article: a, pushes: pushes, loadErr: err, pushIn: ti}
44	}
45	
46	func (m articleViewModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }
47	
48	func (m articleViewModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
49		switch msg := msg.(type) {
50		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
51			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
52			return m, nil
53	
54		case PushAddedMsg:
55			if m.article != nil && msg.ArticleID == m.article.ID {
56				ctx := context.Background()
57				// Re-fetch from DB so timestamps and recommend_score reflect
58				// the canonical state, not the just-synthesized broker payload.
59				if pushes, err := m.deps.Store.Pushes().ListByArticle(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
60					m.pushes = pushes
61				}
62				if a, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
63					m.article = a
64				}
65			}
66			return m, nil
67	
68		case tea.KeyMsg:
69			if m.pushing {
70				return m.updatePushInput(msg)
71			}
72			switch msg.String() {
73			case "esc", "backspace", "left", "h":
74				boardID := int64(0)
75				if m.article != nil {
76					boardID = m.article.BoardID
77				}
78				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardView, BoardID: boardID} }
79			case "up", "k":
80				if m.scroll > 0 {
81					m.scroll--
82				}
83			case "down", "j":
84				m.scroll++
85			case "pgup", "b":
86				m.scroll = max(0, m.scroll-10)
87			case "pgdown", " ":
88				m.scroll += 10
89			case "+":
90				return m.openPush(store.PushKindPush), nil
91			case "-":
92				return m.openPush(store.PushKindBoo), nil
93			case "=":
94				return m.openPush(store.PushKindArrow), nil
95			}
96		}
97		return m, nil
98	}
99	
100	func (m articleViewModel) openPush(k store.PushKind) tea.Model {
101		m.pushing = true
102		m.pushKind = k
103		m.pushIn.SetValue("")
104		m.pushIn.Focus()
105		m.err = ""
106		return m
107	}
108	
109	func (m articleViewModel) updatePushInput(msg tea.KeyMsg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
110		switch msg.String() {
111		case "esc":
112			m.pushing = false
113			m.pushIn.Blur()
114			return m, nil
115		case "enter":
116			body := strings.TrimSpace(m.pushIn.Value())
117			if body == "" && m.pushKind != store.PushKindArrow {
118				m.err = "comment required for 推/噓"
119				return m, nil
120			}
121			ctx := context.Background()
122			u := m.deps.User
123			p, err := m.deps.Store.Pushes().Create(ctx, m.article.ID, u.ID, u.UserID, m.pushKind, body)
124			if err != nil {
125				m.err = err.Error()
126				return m, nil
127			}
128			// Append locally so the originator sees it immediately.
129			m.pushes = append(m.pushes, p)
130			if a, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
131				m.article = a
132			}
133			m.pushing = false
134			m.pushIn.Blur()
135			// Broadcast to other live sessions; they filter by ArticleID.
136			if m.deps.Broker != nil {
137				m.deps.Broker.SendToAll(u.ID, PushAddedMsg{
138					ArticleID:  m.article.ID,
139					UserUserID: u.UserID,
140					Kind:       string(m.pushKind),
141					Body:       body,
142				})
143			}
144			return m, nil
145		}
146		var cmd tea.Cmd
147		m.pushIn, cmd = m.pushIn.Update(msg)
148		return m, cmd
149	}
150	
151	func (m articleViewModel) View() string {
152		if m.loadErr != nil {
153			return "\n  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.loadErr.Error()) + "\n"
154		}
155		if m.article == nil {
156			return "\n  " + StyleDim.Render("(no article)") + "\n"
157		}
158		a := m.article
159	
160		var b strings.Builder
161		b.WriteString("\n")
162		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(fmt.Sprintf(" 文章 #%d · %s ", a.ID, a.AuthorUserID)))
163		b.WriteString("\n\n")
164	
165		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Title: ") + a.Title + "\n")
166		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Date:  ") + a.CreatedAt.Format("2006-01-02 15:04:05") + "\n")
167		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Score: ") + fmt.Sprintf("%d", a.RecommendScore) + "\n")
168		b.WriteString("\n")
169	
170		bodyLines := strings.Split(a.Body, "\n")
171		start := min(m.scroll, len(bodyLines))
172		maxLines := max(m.height-16, 5)
173		end := min(start+maxLines, len(bodyLines))
174		for _, line := range bodyLines[start:end] {
175			b.WriteString("  " + line + "\n")
176		}
177		if start > 0 || end < len(bodyLines) {
178			b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render(fmt.Sprintf("[lines %d-%d / %d]", start+1, end, len(bodyLines))))
179			b.WriteString("\n")
180		}
181	
182		if len(m.pushes) > 0 {
183			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleDim.Render(fmt.Sprintf("── 推文 (%d) ──", len(m.pushes))) + "\n")
184			for _, p := range m.pushes {
185				ts := p.CreatedAt.Format("01/02 15:04")
186				line := fmt.Sprintf("  %s %s %s  %s",
187					renderPushKind(p.Kind),
188					PadRight(p.UserUserID, 14),
189					p.Body,
190					StyleDim.Render(ts),
191				)
192				b.WriteString(line + "\n")
193			}
194		}
195	
196		if m.pushing {
197			b.WriteString("\n  ")
198			b.WriteString(renderPushKind(m.pushKind) + " ")
199			b.WriteString(m.pushIn.View())
200			b.WriteString("\n")
201			if m.err != "" {
202				b.WriteString("  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.err) + "\n")
203			}
204			b.WriteString("  " + StyleHelp.Render("Enter send · Esc cancel"))
205		} else {
206			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("j/k scroll · + 推 · - 噓 · = → · Esc/← back · Ctrl+C disconnect"))
207		}
208		b.WriteString("\n")
209		return b.String()
210	}
211	
212	func renderPushKind(k store.PushKind) string {
213		switch k {
214		case store.PushKindPush:
215			return StylePushKind.Render("推")
216		case store.PushKindBoo:
217			return StyleBooKind.Render("噓")
218		case store.PushKindArrow:
219			return StyleArrowKind.Render("→")
220		}
221		return "?"
222	}
223
```

```text
1	package tui
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"strings"
6	
7		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textarea"
8		"github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/textinput"
9		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
10	)
11	
12	const (
13		composeFocusTitle = iota
14		composeFocusBody
15	)
16	
17	type postComposeModel struct {
18		deps    Deps
19		boardID int64
20		title   textinput.Model
21		body    textarea.Model
22		focus   int
23		width   int
24		height  int
25		err     string
26	}
27	
28	func newPostComposeModel(deps Deps, boardID int64) postComposeModel {
29		ti := textinput.New()
30		ti.Placeholder = "標題 title"
31		ti.CharLimit = 64
32		ti.Width = 60
33		ti.Focus()
34	
35		ta := textarea.New()
36		ta.Placeholder = "內容 body…"
37		ta.CharLimit = 8000
38		ta.SetWidth(72)
39		ta.SetHeight(12)
40	
41		return postComposeModel{
42			deps:    deps,
43			boardID: boardID,
44			title:   ti,
45			body:    ta,
46			focus:   composeFocusTitle,
47		}
48	}
49	
50	func (m postComposeModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return textinput.Blink }
51	
52	func (m postComposeModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
53		switch msg := msg.(type) {
54		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
55			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
56			bodyW := max(40, msg.Width-8)
57			bodyH := max(8, msg.Height-12)
58			m.body.SetWidth(bodyW)
59			m.body.SetHeight(bodyH)
60			m.title.Width = max(20, msg.Width-12)
61			return m, nil
62	
63		case tea.KeyMsg:
64			switch msg.String() {
65			case "esc":
66				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardView, BoardID: m.boardID} }
67			case "tab":
68				m.toggleFocus()
69				return m, nil
70			case "ctrl+s":
71				return m.submit()
72			}
73		}
74	
75		var cmd tea.Cmd
76		if m.focus == composeFocusTitle {
77			// In title field, Enter advances to body.
78			if k, ok := msg.(tea.KeyMsg); ok && k.String() == "enter" {
79				m.toggleFocus()
80				return m, nil
81			}
82			m.title, cmd = m.title.Update(msg)
83		} else {
84			m.body, cmd = m.body.Update(msg)
85		}
86		return m, cmd
87	}
88	
89	func (m *postComposeModel) toggleFocus() {
90		if m.focus == composeFocusTitle {
91			m.focus = composeFocusBody
92			m.title.Blur()
93			m.body.Focus()
94		} else {
95			m.focus = composeFocusTitle
96			m.body.Blur()
97			m.title.Focus()
98		}
99	}
100	
101	func (m postComposeModel) submit() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
102		title := strings.TrimSpace(m.title.Value())
103		body := m.body.Value()
104		if title == "" {
105			m.err = "title is required"
106			return m, nil
107		}
108		if strings.TrimSpace(body) == "" {
109			m.err = "body is required"
110			return m, nil
111		}
112		ctx := context.Background()
113		u := m.deps.User
114		_, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().Create(ctx, m.boardID, u.ID, u.UserID, title, body)
115		if err != nil {
116			m.err = err.Error()
117			return m, nil
118		}
119		if err := m.deps.Store.Users().IncrementPosts(ctx, u.ID); err != nil {
120			m.err = err.Error()
121			return m, nil
122		}
123		return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardView, BoardID: m.boardID} }
124	}
125	
126	func (m postComposeModel) View() string {
127		var b strings.Builder
128		b.WriteString("\n")
129		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 發表新文章 New Post "))
130		b.WriteString("\n\n")
131	
132		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Title:") + "\n")
133		b.WriteString("  " + m.title.View() + "\n\n")
134	
135		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Body:") + "\n")
136		b.WriteString("  " + indent(m.body.View(), "  ") + "\n")
137	
138		if m.err != "" {
139			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.err) + "\n")
140		}
141		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("Tab switch field · Enter (in title) → body · Ctrl+S send · Esc cancel"))
142		b.WriteString("\n")
143		return b.String()
144	}
145	
146	func indent(s, prefix string) string {
147		lines := strings.Split(s, "\n")
148		for i, ln := range lines {
149			if i == 0 {
150				continue
151			}
152			lines[i] = prefix + ln
153		}
154		return strings.Join(lines, "\n")
155	}
156

1	package tui
2	
3	// Screen identifies which sub-model the Root should be showing.
4	type Screen int
5	
6	const (
7		ScreenMainMenu Screen = iota
8		ScreenBoardList
9		ScreenBoardView
10		ScreenArticleView
11		ScreenPostCompose
12		ScreenWBInbox
13		ScreenWBCompose
14	)
15	
16	// NavigateMsg is emitted by sub-screens to ask the Root to swap screens.
17	// Optional fields carry context the destination screen needs.
18	type NavigateMsg struct {
19		To        Screen
20		BoardID   int64
21		ArticleID int64
22		Recipient string // for ScreenWBCompose: prefilled recipient userid
23	}
24	
25	// ErrorMsg surfaces an error as a transient toast.
26	type ErrorMsg struct{ Err error }
27	
28	// WBIncomingMsg is delivered by the chat broker (or replayed from DB on Init)
29	// to notify the recipient that a new water balloon arrived.
30	type WBIncomingMsg struct {
31		ID         int64
32		FromUserID string
33		Body       string
34	}
35	
36	// PushAddedMsg is broadcast by the chat broker when a push is added to an
37	// article. The article-view model checks ArticleID to decide whether to
38	// re-render.
39	type PushAddedMsg struct {
40		ArticleID  int64
41		UserUserID string
42		Kind       string
43		Body       string
44	}
45

1	package chat_test
2	
3	import (
4		"sync"
5		"sync/atomic"
6		"testing"
7	
8		tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
9	
10		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/chat"
11	)
12	
13	// fakeSender is a chat.Sender that records every message for assertion.
14	type fakeSender struct {
15		mu     sync.Mutex
16		got    []tea.Msg
17		id     int // for distinguishing "雙開" sessions
18	}
19	
20	func newFake(id int) *fakeSender { return &fakeSender{id: id} }
21	
22	func (f *fakeSender) Send(msg tea.Msg) {
23		f.mu.Lock()
24		defer f.mu.Unlock()
25		f.got = append(f.got, msg)
26	}
27	
28	func (f *fakeSender) Got() []tea.Msg {
29		f.mu.Lock()
30		defer f.mu.Unlock()
31		out := make([]tea.Msg, len(f.got))
32		copy(out, f.got)
33		return out
34	}
35	
36	func TestBroker_RegisterAppearsOnline(t *testing.T) {
37		b := chat.NewBroker()
38		s := newFake(1)
39		b.Register(&chat.Session{UserID: 1, UserIDStr: "alice", Program: s})
40	
41		online := b.OnlineList()
42		if len(online) != 1 {
43			t.Fatalf("got %d online, want 1", len(online))
44		}
45		if online[0].UserIDStr != "alice" || online[0].Sessions != 1 {
46			t.Errorf("online[0] = %+v", online[0])
47		}
48	}
49	
50	func TestBroker_UnregisterRemoves(t *testing.T) {
51		b := chat.NewBroker()
52		s := newFake(1)
53		b.Register(&chat.Session{UserID: 1, UserIDStr: "alice", Program: s})
54		b.Unregister(1, s)
55		if len(b.OnlineList()) != 0 {
56			t.Errorf("OnlineList not empty after Unregister")
57		}
58	}
59	
60	// 雙開: same user, two sessions. Send should reach both. Unregister one
61	// must keep the other online.
62	func TestBroker_MultipleSessionsSameUser(t *testing.T) {
63		b := chat.NewBroker()
64		s1 := newFake(1)
65		s2 := newFake(2)
66		b.Register(&chat.Session{UserID: 1, UserIDStr: "alice", Program: s1})
67		b.Register(&chat.Session{UserID: 1, UserIDStr: "alice", Program: s2})
68	
69		online := b.OnlineList()
70		if len(online) != 1 {
71			t.Fatalf("OnlineList: got %d entries, want 1 (one user, two sessions)", len(online))
72		}
73		if online[0].Sessions != 2 {
74			t.Errorf("Sessions = %d, want 2", online[0].Sessions)
75		}
76	
77		if !b.Send(1, "hello") {
78			t.Error("Send returned false but recipient is online")
79		}
80		for i, s := range []*fakeSender{s1, s2} {
81			if g := s.Got(); len(g) != 1 || g[0] != "hello" {
82				t.Errorf("session %d got %v, want [\"hello\"]", i, g)
83			}
84		}
85	
86		// Drop s1; s2 must remain.
87		b.Unregister(1, s1)
88		if !b.Send(1, "again") {
89			t.Error("Send returned false; s2 should still be online")
90		}
91		if len(s1.Got()) != 1 {
92			t.Errorf("s1 received message after Unregister; len=%d", len(s1.Got()))
93		}
94		if len(s2.Got()) != 2 {
95			t.Errorf("s2.Got = %v, want length 2", s2.Got())
96		}
97	}
98	
99	func TestBroker_SendToOfflineReturnsFalse(t *testing.T) {
100		b := chat.NewBroker()
101		if b.Send(99, "x") {
102			t.Error("Send to nobody returned true")
103		}
104	}
105	
106	func TestBroker_SendToAllExcludesSender(t *testing.T) {
107		b := chat.NewBroker()
108		alice := newFake(1)
109		bob := newFake(2)
110		b.Register(&chat.Session{UserID: 1, UserIDStr: "alice", Program: alice})
111		b.Register(&chat.Session{UserID: 2, UserIDStr: "bob", Program: bob})
112	
113		b.SendToAll(1, "broadcast")
114	
115		if g := alice.Got(); len(g) != 0 {
116			t.Errorf("alice (sender) received broadcast: %v", g)
117		}
118		if g := bob.Got(); len(g) != 1 || g[0] != "broadcast" {
119			t.Errorf("bob got %v, want [\"broadcast\"]", g)
120		}
121	}
122	
123	func TestBroker_LookupByUserID(t *testing.T) {
124		b := chat.NewBroker()
125		b.Register(&chat.Session{UserID: 42, UserIDStr: "alice", Program: newFake(1)})
126		if got := b.LookupByUserID("alice"); got != 42 {
127			t.Errorf("LookupByUserID(alice) = %d, want 42", got)
128		}
129		if got := b.LookupByUserID("ALICE"); got != 42 {
130			t.Errorf("LookupByUserID(ALICE) (case-insensitive) = %d, want 42", got)
131		}
132		if got := b.LookupByUserID("ghost"); got != 0 {
133			t.Errorf("LookupByUserID(ghost) = %d, want 0", got)
134		}
135	}
136	
137	// Concurrency stress: many Register / Unregister / Send running together.
138	// Run with `go test -race` to surface data races.
139	func TestBroker_Concurrency(t *testing.T) {
140		b := chat.NewBroker()
141		const workers = 16
142		const iters = 100
143	
144		var sent atomic.Int64
145	
146		var wg sync.WaitGroup
147		for w := 0; w < workers; w++ {
148			wg.Add(1)
149			go func(id int64) {
150				defer wg.Done()
151				s := newFake(int(id))
152				for i := 0; i < iters; i++ {
153					b.Register(&chat.Session{UserID: id, UserIDStr: "u", Program: s})
154					b.Send(id, "x")
155					sent.Add(1)
156					b.Unregister(id, s)
157				}
158			}(int64(w + 1))
159		}
160		wg.Wait()
161	
162		if got := len(b.OnlineList()); got != 0 {
163			t.Errorf("OnlineList not empty after all unregisters: %d", got)
164		}
165		if sent.Load() != int64(workers*iters) {
166			t.Errorf("sent = %d, want %d", sent.Load(), workers*iters)
167		}
168	}
169

Perfect. I now have all the information I need. Let me compile my findings into a concise report.

---

## Territory Map: Mailbox Feature

**1. Migration Pattern**

- **Location**: `/Volumes/Data/Program/tries/2026-04-29-ssh-bbs/internal/store/migrations/`
- **Naming**: `NNNN_name.sql` format (e.g., `0001_init.sql`, `0002_seed_boards.sql`). Next migration should be `0003_add_mailbox.sql`.
- **Discovery**: `migrate.go` (line 13) embeds migrations via `//go:embed migrations/*.sql`; `apply()` (line 20) reads the directory, parses version numbers from filenames before underscores (line 102–112), tracks applied versions in `schema_migrations` table (line 21–28), and runs pending migrations in ascending version order within individual transactions (line 58–66).
- **Content style**: Raw SQL with pragma setup (line 7 of 0001), DDL, indexes. Seed migrations use INSERT statements.

**2. WaterBalloon Repo + Schema**

- **Schema** (0001_init.sql, lines 57–67):
  ```sql
  CREATE TABLE water_balloons (
      id              INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
      from_user_id    INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
      from_userid     TEXT NOT NULL,
      to_user_id      INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
      body            TEXT NOT NULL,
      delivered_live  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      read_at         DATETIME,
      created_at      DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
  );
  CREATE INDEX idx_wb_to_unread ON water_balloons(to_user_id, read_at);
  ```
- **Repo file**: `/Volumes/Data/Program/tries/2026-04-29-ssh-bbs/internal/store/waterballoons.go`
- **Key methods**:
  - `Insert(ctx, fromID, fromUserID, toID, body, deliveredLive)` → `*WaterBalloon` (line 34–54): acquires writeMu lock, returns full row with LastInsertId.
  - `ListUnreadFor(ctx, toUserID)` → `[]*WaterBalloon` (line 58–76): unread only, oldest-first by ID (ASC) for replay ordering.
  - `ListInboxFor(ctx, toUserID, limit)` → `[]*WaterBalloon` (line 80–102): unread first (DESC), then read newest-first, ordered by `(read_at IS NULL) DESC, id DESC`.
  - `MarkRead(ctx, id)` → error (line 104–111): writeMu lock, sets `read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP` where still unread.
  - `MarkAllReadFor(ctx, toUserID)` → error (line 113–121): bulk mark read.
- **Scanning pattern** (line 24–32): `scanWB()` helper converts row into struct, converts int64 to bool for `DeliveredLive`.

**3. WaterBalloon Screen Pattern**

- **File**: `/Volumes/Data/Program/tries/2026-04-29-ssh-bbs/internal/tui/screen_wb.go`
- **Two models**:
  - `wbInboxModel` (line 20–124): displays list with date, from-user, status (NEW/·), body; cursor navigation (↑/↓/j/k); Enter/r/l/→ to reply; c to compose.
  - `wbComposeModel` (line 135–291): two-field form (to user, body); Tab to switch focus; Ctrl+S to send; success screen on sent.
- **Constants** (line 130–133): `wbFocusTo`, `wbFocusBody` focus indices.
- **Initialization** (line 29–37, 146–168): `newWBInboxModel()` calls `ListInboxFor()` and marks all read; `newWBComposeModel()` accepts pre-filled recipient.
- **Navigation**: KeyMsg handlers emit `NavigateMsg{To: ScreenWBInbox}` or `{To: ScreenWBCompose, Recipient: ...}` (lines 49, 59, 66, 181, 185).

**4. Storage Test Helper**

- **File**: `/Volumes/Data/Program/tries/2026-04-29-ssh-bbs/internal/store/storetest/storetest.go`
- **`New(tb)`** (line 17–26): creates temp dir via `tb.TempDir()`, calls `store.Open()`, runs migrations, registers Cleanup for Close, returns `*store.Store`.
- **Example test**: `/Volumes/Data/Program/tries/2026-04-29-ssh-bbs/internal/store/waterballoons_test.go`
  - Setup pattern (e.g., line 10–21): `st := storetest.New(t)`, then `storetest.MustUser()` for identities.
  - Exercise: calls repo methods (Insert, ListUnreadFor, MarkRead) directly.
  - Verify: slice assertions and ordering checks (lines 27–35, 78–108).
- **Helper functions** (storetest.go, lines 30–49): `MustUser()` creates user; `MustBoard()` fetches seeded board.

**5. Repo Wiring into App**

- **Main entry** (`cmd/sshbbs/main.go`, line 28): `st, err := store.Open(dbPath)` opens Store and applies migrations.
- **Server creation** (line 40): `server.New(config, st, broker)` — Store is passed to `server.New()`.
- **ProgramHandler** (`internal/server/server.go`, line 41–96): `makeProgramHandler(st, broker)` receives Store; builds `Deps{Store: st, Broker: broker, User: user}` (line 47, 63); passes to `tui.NewRoot(deps)` (line 48, 64). Each TUI screen receives the full `Deps` struct (line 15–20 in `root.go`).
- **Repo accessor**: `Store.WaterBalloons()` (line 65 in `store.go`), called by screens via `m.deps.Store.WaterBalloons().Insert/ListInboxFor/MarkRead()`.

**Key wiring points for Mailbox**:
- Add `mailbox *MailboxRepo` field to `Store` struct (store.go, line 25).
- Initialize in `Store.Open()` (line 51): `s.mailbox = &MailboxRepo{s: s}`.
- Add accessor `(s *Store) Mailbox() *MailboxRepo` (line 65).
- Create migration `0003_add_mailbox.sql` with threaded message schema + indices.
- Create `internal/store/mailbox.go` following WaterBalloon patterns (Insert, List, MarkRead signatures).
- Add screen constants to `messages.go` (line 12–13) and navigation cases in `root.go` (line 122–125).
- Screens access via `m.deps.Store.Mailbox()` just like water balloons.

1	package store
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"database/sql"
6		"errors"
7		"time"
8	)
9	
10	type User struct {
11		ID            int64
12		UserID        string
13		PasswordHash  string
14		Nickname      string
15		RealName      string
16		Email         string
17		NumLogins     int64
18		NumPosts      int64
19		LastLoginAt   sql.NullTime
20		LastHost      sql.NullString
21		CreatedAt     time.Time
22	}
23	
24	type UserRepo struct{ s *Store }
25	
26	var ErrUserNotFound = errors.New("user not found")
27	
28	const userColumns = `id, user_id, password_hash, nickname, realname, email,
29		num_logins, num_posts, last_login_at, last_host, created_at`
30	
31	func scanUser(row interface{ Scan(...any) error }) (*User, error) {
32		u := &User{}
33		err := row.Scan(
34			&u.ID, &u.UserID, &u.PasswordHash, &u.Nickname, &u.RealName, &u.Email,
35			&u.NumLogins, &u.NumPosts, &u.LastLoginAt, &u.LastHost, &u.CreatedAt,
36		)
37		return u, err
38	}
39	
40	func (r *UserRepo) Create(ctx context.Context, userID, passwordHash, nickname, email string) (*User, error) {
41		r.s.writeMu.Lock()
42		defer r.s.writeMu.Unlock()
43		res, err := r.s.db.ExecContext(ctx,
44			`INSERT INTO users (user_id, password_hash, nickname, email) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`,
45			userID, passwordHash, nickname, email,
46		)
47		if err != nil {
48			return nil, err
49		}
50		id, err := res.LastInsertId()
51		if err != nil {
52			return nil, err
53		}
54		return r.GetByID(ctx, id)
55	}
56	
57	func (r *UserRepo) GetByID(ctx context.Context, id int64) (*User, error) {
58		row := r.s.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, `SELECT `+userColumns+` FROM users WHERE id = ?`, id)
59		u, err := scanUser(row)
60		if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
61			return nil, ErrUserNotFound
62		}
63		return u, err
64	}
65	
66	func (r *UserRepo) GetByUserID(ctx context.Context, userID string) (*User, error) {
67		row := r.s.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, `SELECT `+userColumns+` FROM users WHERE user_id = ? COLLATE NOCASE`, userID)
68		u, err := scanUser(row)
69		if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
70			return nil, ErrUserNotFound
71		}
72		return u, err
73	}
74	
75	func (r *UserRepo) NoteLogin(ctx context.Context, id int64, host string) error {
76		r.s.writeMu.Lock()
77		defer r.s.writeMu.Unlock()
78		_, err := r.s.db.ExecContext(ctx,
79			`UPDATE users SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_host = ?, num_logins = num_logins + 1 WHERE id = ?`,
80			host, id,

**File**: `/Volumes/Data/Program/tries/2026-04-29-ssh-bbs/internal/tui/root.go` (lines 109–141)
- `navigate()` method switches on `n.To` and calls the corresponding `newXxxModel()` constructor (one case per screen)
- Pattern: each case passes `m.deps` (Deps struct) + screen-specific IDs → model calls `sub.Init()` + forwards window size

**Actual key handling pattern** (`screen_board_view.go` lines 40–73):
- Case statements for each key: `"esc", "backspace", "left", "h"` (back) → navigate to parent
- `"up", "k"` / `"down", "j"` (move cursor)

## Territory Map: Chat Broker, Broadcast Pattern & Post Compose Flow

### 1. **Broker API** — `/Volumes/Data/Program/tries/2026-04-29-ssh-bbs/internal/chat/broker.go`

**Signatures:**
- **`Send(toUID int64, msg tea.Msg) bool`** (line 71): Delivers msg to all live sessions of a user; returns true if ≥1 session received it.
- **`SendToAll(excludeUID int64, msg tea.Msg)`** (line 83): Broadcasts to every online session except the originator (pass 0 to include sender).
- **`Register(s *Session)`** (line 45): Adds a session to the broker's registry.
- **`Unregister(userID int64, prog Sender)`** (line 54): Removes a single session; deletes user from online list when last session closes.
- **`OnlineList() []OnlineUser`** (line 111): Returns slice of `OnlineUser` structs (line 30).
- **`LookupByUserID(name string) int64`** (line 98): Case-insensitive lookup of numeric user ID by username; returns 0 if offline.

**Sender interface** (line 16):
```go
type Sender interface {
    Send(tea.Msg)
}
```

**Messages currently flowing:**
- `PushAddedMsg` — defined in `internal/tui/messages.go` (line 39), carries `ArticleID`, `UserUserID`, `Kind`, `Body`.
- `WBIncomingMsg` — water balloon arrival notification (line 30 of messages.go).

        ArticleID:  m.article.ID,
        UserUserID: u.UserID,
        Kind:       string(m.pushKind),
        Body:       body,
    })
}
```
Called in `updatePushInput` after `Create()` succeeds (line 123).

**Receiver pattern** (lines 54–66):
```go
case PushAddedMsg:
    if m.article != nil && msg.ArticleID == m.article.ID {
        ctx := context.Background()
        // Re-fetch from DB so timestamps and recommend_score reflect canonical state
        if pushes, err := m.deps.Store.Pushes().ListByArticle(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
            m.pushes = pushes
        }
        if a, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().GetByID(ctx, m.article.ID); err == nil {
            m.article = a
        }
    }
```
Filters by `ArticleID`, re-fetches pushes and article from DB to get canonical timestamps/scores.

---

### 3. **Post Compose Flow** — `/Volumes/Data/Program/tries/2026-04-29-ssh-bbs/internal/tui/screen_post_compose.go`

**`submit()` function** (lines 101–124):
```go
func (m postComposeModel) submit() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
    title := strings.TrimSpace(m.title.Value())
    body := m.body.Value()
    if title == "" {
        m.err = "title is required"
        return m, nil
    }
    if strings.TrimSpace(body) == "" {
        m.err = "body is required"
        return m, nil
    }
    ctx := context.Background()
    u := m.deps.User
    _, err := m.deps.Store.Articles().Create(ctx, m.boardID, u.ID, u.UserID, title, body)
    if err != nil {
        m.err = err.Error()
        return m, nil
    }
    if err := m.deps.Store.Users().IncrementPosts(ctx, u.ID); err != nil {
        m.err = err.Error()
        return m, nil
    }
    return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenBoardView, BoardID: m.boardID} }
}
```
**Injection point for `ArticleAddedMsg`:** After line 114 (after `Articles().Create()` succeeds, before `IncrementPosts()`). The returned article from `Create()` is discarded—you'd need to capture it or query it back to get the `ArticleID` for broadcast.

1	-- Initial schema for the SSH BBS.
2	-- All tables use auto-increment INTEGER PRIMARY KEY plus a unique business
3	-- key where appropriate. We deliberately do NOT mimic pttbbs's recno-based
4	-- addressing (a holdover from mmap'd binary .DIR files) — a relational DB
5	-- removes the recno-tombstone fragility documented in pttbbs.
6	
7	PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;
8	
9	CREATE TABLE users (
10	    id              INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
11	    user_id         TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE COLLATE NOCASE, -- userec_t.userid
12	    password_hash   TEXT NOT NULL,                       -- bcrypt; replaces userec_t.passwd (DES)
13	    nickname        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',            -- userec_t.nickname
14	    realname        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',            -- userec_t.realname
15	    email           TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',            -- userec_t.email
16	    num_logins      INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,          -- userec_t.numlogindays (loose)
17	    num_posts       INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,          -- userec_t.numposts
18	    last_login_at   DATETIME,                            -- userec_t.lastlogin
19	    last_host       TEXT,                                -- userec_t.lasthost
20	    created_at      DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
21	);
22	
23	CREATE TABLE boards (
24	    id              INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
25	    name            TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE COLLATE NOCASE, -- boardheader_t.brdname
26	    title           TEXT NOT NULL,                       -- boardheader_t.title
27	    description     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
28	    bm              TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',            -- boardheader_t.BM (comma-sep)
29	    attr            INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,          -- boardheader_t.brdattr (P1+)
30	    created_at      DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
31	);
32	
33	CREATE TABLE articles (
34	    id              INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
35	    board_id        INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES boards(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
36	    author_id       INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
37	    author_userid   TEXT NOT NULL,                       -- denormalized (fileheader_t.owner)
38	    title           TEXT NOT NULL,                       -- fileheader_t.title
39	    body            TEXT NOT NULL,
40	    recommend_score INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,          -- cached sum of pushes (+1) - boos (-1)
41	    filemode        INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,          -- fileheader_t.filemode (P1+)
42	    created_at      DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
43	);
44	CREATE INDEX idx_articles_board_created ON articles(board_id, created_at DESC);
45	
46	CREATE TABLE pushes (
47	    id              INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
48	    article_id      INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES articles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
49	    user_id         INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
50	    user_userid     TEXT NOT NULL,                       -- denormalized
51	    kind            TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (kind IN ('push','boo','arrow')), -- 推/噓/→
52	    body            TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
53	    created_at      DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
54	);
55	CREATE INDEX idx_pushes_article ON pushes(article_id, id);
56	
57	CREATE TABLE water_balloons (
58	    id              INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
59	    from_user_id    INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
60	    from_userid     TEXT NOT NULL,                       -- denormalized
61	    to_user_id      INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
62	    body            TEXT NOT NULL,

65	    created_at      DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
66	);

68

 `./internal/store/migrate.go`

```text
1	package store
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"database/sql"
6		"embed"
7		"fmt"
8		"sort"
9		"strconv"
10		"strings"
11	)
12	
13	//go:embed migrations/*.sql
14	var migrationsFS embed.FS
15	
16	// apply runs every migration whose version number isn't already in
17	// schema_migrations. Filenames must be NNNN_name.sql; the leading integer is
18	// the version. Migrations are applied in ascending version order, each in
19	// its own transaction.
20	func apply(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB) error {
21		if _, err := db.ExecContext(ctx, `
22			CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_migrations (
23				version    INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
24				applied_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
25			)
26		`); err != nil {
27			return fmt.Errorf("create schema_migrations: %w", err)
28		}
29	
30		applied, err := loadApplied(ctx, db)
31		if err != nil {
32			return err
33		}
34	
35		entries, err := migrationsFS.ReadDir("migrations")
36		if err != nil {
37			return fmt.Errorf("read embedded migrations: %w", err)
38		}
39		type migration struct {
40			version  int
41			filename string
42		}
43		var pending []migration
44		for _, e := range entries {
45			if e.IsDir() || !strings.HasSuffix(e.Name(), ".sql") {
46				continue
47			}
48			v, err := parseVersion(e.Name())
49			if err != nil {
50				return err
51			}
52			if !applied[v] {
53				pending = append(pending, migration{version: v, filename: e.Name()})
54			}
55		}
56		sort.Slice(pending, func(i, j int) bool { return pending[i].version < pending[j].version })
57	
58		for _, m := range pending {
59			body, err := migrationsFS.ReadFile("migrations/" + m.filename)
60			if err != nil {
61				return fmt.Errorf("read migration %s: %w", m.filename, err)
62			}
63			if err := runOne(ctx, db, m.version, string(body)); err != nil {
64				return fmt.Errorf("apply %s: %w", m.filename, err)
65			}
66		}
67		return nil
68	}
69	
70	func loadApplied(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB) (map[int]bool, error) {
71		rows, err := db.QueryContext(ctx, `SELECT version FROM schema_migrations`)
72		if err != nil {
73			return nil, fmt.Errorf("load applied migrations: %w", err)
74		}
75		defer rows.Close()
76		out := map[int]bool{}
77		for rows.Next() {
78			var v int
79			if err := rows.Scan(&v); err != nil {
80				return nil, err
81			}
82			out[v] = true
83		}
84		return out, rows.Err()
85	}
86	
87	func runOne(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, version int, body string) error {
88		tx, err := db.BeginTx(ctx, nil)
89		if err != nil {
90			return err
91		}
92		defer tx.Rollback()
93		if _, err := tx.ExecContext(ctx, body); err != nil {
94			return err
95		}
96		if _, err := tx.ExecContext(ctx, `INSERT INTO schema_migrations(version) VALUES (?)`, version); err != nil {
97			return err
98		}
99		return tx.Commit()
100	}
101	
102	func parseVersion(filename string) (int, error) {
103		// "0001_init.sql" -> 1
104		idx := strings.IndexByte(filename, '_')
105		if idx <= 0 {
106			return 0, fmt.Errorf("migration filename missing version prefix: %s", filename)
107		}
108		v, err := strconv.Atoi(filename[:idx])
109		if err != nil {
110			return 0, fmt.Errorf("parse version in %s: %w", filename, err)
111		}
112		return v, nil
113	}
114
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	package store
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"database/sql"
6		"time"
7	)
8	
9	type WaterBalloon struct {
10		ID            int64
11		FromUserID    int64
12		FromUserIDStr string
13		ToUserID      int64
14		Body          string
15		DeliveredLive bool
16		ReadAt        sql.NullTime
17		CreatedAt     time.Time
18	}
19	
20	type WaterBalloonRepo struct{ s *Store }
21	
22	const wbColumns = `id, from_user_id, from_userid, to_user_id, body, delivered_live, read_at, created_at`
23	
24	func scanWB(row interface{ Scan(...any) error }) (*WaterBalloon, error) {
25		w := &WaterBalloon{}
26		var deliveredLive int64
27		if err := row.Scan(&w.ID, &w.FromUserID, &w.FromUserIDStr, &w.ToUserID, &w.Body, &deliveredLive, &w.ReadAt, &w.CreatedAt); err != nil {
28			return nil, err
29		}
30		w.DeliveredLive = deliveredLive != 0
31		return w, nil
32	}
33	
34	func (r *WaterBalloonRepo) Insert(ctx context.Context, fromID int64, fromUserID string, toID int64, body string, deliveredLive bool) (*WaterBalloon, error) {
35		r.s.writeMu.Lock()
36		defer r.s.writeMu.Unlock()
37		live := int64(0)
38		if deliveredLive {
39			live = 1
40		}
41		res, err := r.s.db.ExecContext(ctx,
42			`INSERT INTO water_balloons (from_user_id, from_userid, to_user_id, body, delivered_live) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
43			fromID, fromUserID, toID, body, live,
44		)
45		if err != nil {
46			return nil, err
47		}
48		id, err := res.LastInsertId()
49		if err != nil {
50			return nil, err
51		}
52		row := r.s.db.QueryRowContext(ctx, `SELECT `+wbColumns+` FROM water_balloons WHERE id = ?`, id)
53		return scanWB(row)
54	}
55	
56	// ListUnreadFor returns unread water balloons for the recipient, oldest
57	// first, so the TUI can replay them on reconnect.
58	func (r *WaterBalloonRepo) ListUnreadFor(ctx context.Context, toUserID int64) ([]*WaterBalloon, error) {
59		rows, err := r.s.db.QueryContext(ctx,
60			`SELECT `+wbColumns+` FROM water_balloons WHERE to_user_id = ? AND read_at IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC`,
61			toUserID,
62		)
63		if err != nil {
64			return nil, err
65		}
66		defer rows.Close()
67		var out []*WaterBalloon
68		for rows.Next() {
69			w, err := scanWB(rows)
70			if err != nil {
71				return nil, err
72			}
73			out = append(out, w)
74		}
75		return out, rows.Err()
76	}
77	
78	// ListInboxFor returns the recipient's inbox: unread first (newest unread
79	// up top), then read messages newest-first.
80	func (r *WaterBalloonRepo) ListInboxFor(ctx context.Context, toUserID int64, limit int) ([]*WaterBalloon, error) {
81		if limit <= 0 {
82			limit = 50
83		}
84		rows, err := r.s.db.QueryContext(ctx,
85			`SELECT `+wbColumns+` FROM water_balloons WHERE to_user_id = ?
86			 ORDER BY (read_at IS NULL) DESC, id DESC LIMIT ?`,
87			toUserID, limit,
88		)
89		if err != nil {
90			return nil, err
91		}
92		defer rows.Close()
93		var out []*WaterBalloon
94		for rows.Next() {
95			w, err := scanWB(rows)
96			if err != nil {
97				return nil, err
98			}
99			out = append(out, w)
100		}
101		return out, rows.Err()
102	}
103	
104	func (r *WaterBalloonRepo) MarkRead(ctx context.Context, id int64) error {
105		r.s.writeMu.Lock()
106		defer r.s.writeMu.Unlock()
107		_, err := r.s.db.ExecContext(ctx,
108			`UPDATE water_balloons SET read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = ? AND read_at IS NULL`, id,
109		)
110		return err
111	}
112	
113	func (r *WaterBalloonRepo) MarkAllReadFor(ctx context.Context, toUserID int64) error {
114		r.s.writeMu.Lock()
115		defer r.s.writeMu.Unlock()
116		_, err := r.s.db.ExecContext(ctx,
117			`UPDATE water_balloons SET read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE to_user_id = ? AND read_at IS NULL`,
118			toUserID,
119		)
120		return err
121	}
122

29	func newWBInboxModel(deps Deps) wbInboxModel {
30		items, err := deps.Store.WaterBalloons().ListInboxFor(context.Background(), deps.User.ID, 100)
31		// Mark all unread as read once shown — matches PTT behaviour where
32		// reading the inbox clears the "new mail" indicator.
33		if err == nil {
34			_ = deps.Store.WaterBalloons().MarkAllReadFor(context.Background(), deps.User.ID)
35		}

39	func (m wbInboxModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return nil }

41	func (m wbInboxModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
42		switch msg := msg.(type) {
43		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
44			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
45			return m, nil
46		case tea.KeyMsg:
47			switch msg.String() {
48			case "esc", "backspace", "left", "h":
49				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenMainMenu} }
50			case "up", "k":
51				if m.cursor > 0 {
52					m.cursor--
53				}
54			case "down", "j":
55				if m.cursor < len(m.items)-1 {
56					m.cursor++
57				}
58			case "c":
59				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenWBCompose} }
60			case "r", "enter", " ", "right", "l":
61				if len(m.items) == 0 {
62					return m, nil
63				}
64				it := m.items[m.cursor]
65				return m, func() tea.Msg {
66					return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenWBCompose, Recipient: it.FromUserIDStr}
67				}
68			}
69		}
70		return m, nil
71	}

88	
89		const (
90			dateW   = 16
91			fromW   = 14
92			statusW = 5

97			PadRight("From", fromW),
98			PadRight("•", statusW),

113			)
114			if i == m.cursor {

170	func (m wbComposeModel) Init() tea.Cmd { return textinput.Blink }
171	
172	func (m wbComposeModel) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
173		switch msg := msg.(type) {
174		case tea.WindowSizeMsg:
175			m.width, m.height = msg.Width, msg.Height
176			m.body.SetWidth(max(40, msg.Width-12))
177			return m, nil
178	
179		case tea.KeyMsg:
180			if m.sent != "" {
181				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenWBInbox} }
182			}
183			switch msg.String() {
184			case "esc":
185				return m, func() tea.Msg { return NavigateMsg{To: ScreenWBInbox} }
186			case "tab":
187				m.toggleFocus()
188				return m, nil
189			case "ctrl+s":
190				return m.submit()
191			}
192	
193			if m.focus == wbFocusTo {
194				if k := msg.String(); k == "enter" {
195					m.toggleFocus()
196					return m, nil
197				}
198				var cmd tea.Cmd
199				m.to, cmd = m.to.Update(msg)
200				return m, cmd
201			}
202			var cmd tea.Cmd
203			m.body, cmd = m.body.Update(msg)
204			return m, cmd
205		}
206		return m, nil
207	}
208	
209	func (m *wbComposeModel) toggleFocus() {
210		if m.focus == wbFocusTo {
211			m.focus = wbFocusBody
212			m.to.Blur()
213			m.body.Focus()
214		} else {
215			m.focus = wbFocusTo
216			m.body.Blur()
217			m.to.Focus()
218		}
219	}
220	
221	func (m wbComposeModel) submit() (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
222		to := strings.TrimSpace(m.to.Value())
223		body := strings.TrimSpace(m.body.Value())
224		if to == "" {
225			m.err = "recipient required"
226			return m, nil
227		}
228		if body == "" {
229			m.err = "body required"
230			return m, nil
231		}
232	
233		ctx := context.Background()
234		target, err := m.deps.Store.Users().GetByUserID(ctx, to)
235		if err != nil {
236			if errors.Is(err, store.ErrUserNotFound) {
237				m.err = "no such user: " + to
238			} else {
239				m.err = err.Error()
240			}
241			return m, nil
242		}
243		from := m.deps.User
244	
245		delivered := false
246		if m.deps.Broker != nil {
247			// Persist first, then notify with the canonical row's ID.
248		}
249		wb, err := m.deps.Store.WaterBalloons().Insert(ctx, from.ID, from.UserID, target.ID, body, false)
250		if err != nil {
251			m.err = err.Error()
252			return m, nil
253		}
254		if m.deps.Broker != nil {
255			delivered = m.deps.Broker.Send(target.ID, WBIncomingMsg{
256				ID:         wb.ID,
257				FromUserID: from.UserID,
258				Body:       body,
259			})
260			if delivered {
261				// The recipient saw it live, so we can mark it read immediately.
262				_ = m.deps.Store.WaterBalloons().MarkRead(ctx, wb.ID)
263			}
264		}
265		m.sent = target.UserID
266		return m, nil
267	}
268	
269	func (m wbComposeModel) View() string {
270		var b strings.Builder
271		b.WriteString("\n")
272		b.WriteString(StyleHeader.Render(" 丟水球 Send Water Balloon "))
273		b.WriteString("\n\n")
274	
275		if m.sent != "" {
276			b.WriteString("  " + StyleSuccess.Render("✓ sent to "+m.sent) + "\n\n")
277			b.WriteString("  " + StyleHelp.Render("any key returns to inbox"))
278			return b.String()
279		}
280	
281		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("To (userid):") + "\n")
282		b.WriteString("  " + m.to.View() + "\n\n")
283		b.WriteString("  " + StyleDim.Render("Body:") + "\n")
284		b.WriteString("  " + indent(m.body.View(), "  ") + "\n")
285	
286		if m.err != "" {
287			b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleError.Render("⚠ "+m.err) + "\n")
288		}
289		b.WriteString("\n  " + StyleHelp.Render("Tab switch field · Enter (in To) → body · Ctrl+S send · Esc cancel"))
290		return b.String()
291	}

```text
1	// Package storetest provides shared helpers for tests that need a fresh
2	// SQLite store. It lives in its own package so any internal package can
3	// import it without creating cycles.
4	package storetest
5	
6	import (
7		"context"
8		"path/filepath"
9		"testing"
10	
11		"github.com/daviddwlee84/sshbbs/internal/store"
12	)
13	
14	// New opens a fresh on-disk SQLite store in t.TempDir(), runs migrations,
15	// and registers a Cleanup to close it. Use it whenever you'd write
16	// `store.Open` in a test — never share stores across tests.
17	func New(tb testing.TB) *store.Store {
18		tb.Helper()
19		dir := tb.TempDir()
20		st, err := store.Open(filepath.Join(dir, "test.db"))
21		if err != nil {
22			tb.Fatalf("store.Open: %v", err)
23		}
24		tb.Cleanup(func() { _ = st.Close() })
25		return st
26	}
27	
28	// MustUser inserts a user with a placeholder password hash and returns it.
29	// Convenient for tests that need a logged-in identity but don't care about auth.
30	func MustUser(tb testing.TB, st *store.Store, userID, nickname string) *store.User {
31		tb.Helper()
32		u, err := st.Users().Create(context.Background(), userID, "$2a$12$placeholderplaceholderplaceholderplaceholderplaceholder.", nickname, "")
33		if err != nil {
34			tb.Fatalf("create user %q: %v", userID, err)
35		}
36		return u
37	}
38	
39	// MustBoard returns a seeded board by name, failing the test if not found.
40	// Useful with the default Welcome / Test / ChitChat boards which
41	// SeedDefaults / migration 0002 create automatically.
42	func MustBoard(tb testing.TB, st *store.Store, name string) *store.Board {
43		tb.Helper()
44		b, err := st.Boards().GetByName(context.Background(), name)
45		if err != nil {
46			tb.Fatalf("get board %q: %v", name, err)
47		}
48		return b
49	}
50

10	func TestWaterBalloons_InsertAndList(t *testing.T) {
11		ctx := context.Background()
12		st := storetest.New(t)
13		alice := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "alice", "")
14		bob := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "bob", "")
15	
16		for i := 0; i < 3; i++ {
17			_, err := st.WaterBalloons().Insert(ctx, alice.ID, alice.UserID, bob.ID, "msg", false)
18			if err != nil {
19				t.Fatalf("Insert: %v", err)
20			}
21		}
22	
23		unread, err := st.WaterBalloons().ListUnreadFor(ctx, bob.ID)
24		if err != nil {
25			t.Fatalf("ListUnreadFor: %v", err)
26		}
27		if len(unread) != 3 {
28			t.Errorf("got %d unread, want 3", len(unread))
29		}
30		// Oldest first by id ASC — important for replay ordering.
31		for i := 0; i < len(unread)-1; i++ {
32			if unread[i].ID > unread[i+1].ID {
33				t.Errorf("ListUnreadFor not in id ASC order")
34			}
35		}
36	}
37	
38	func TestWaterBalloons_MarkRead(t *testing.T) {
39		ctx := context.Background()
40		st := storetest.New(t)
41		alice := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "alice", "")
42		bob := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "bob", "")
43		wb, err := st.WaterBalloons().Insert(ctx, alice.ID, alice.UserID, bob.ID, "hi", true)
44		if err != nil {
45			t.Fatalf("Insert: %v", err)
46		}
47		if err := st.WaterBalloons().MarkRead(ctx, wb.ID); err != nil {
48			t.Fatalf("MarkRead: %v", err)
49		}
50		got, err := st.WaterBalloons().ListUnreadFor(ctx, bob.ID)
51		if err != nil {
52			t.Fatalf("ListUnreadFor: %v", err)
53		}
54		if len(got) != 0 {
55			t.Errorf("got %d unread after MarkRead, want 0", len(got))
56		}
57	}
58	
59	func TestWaterBalloons_MarkAllReadFor(t *testing.T) {
60		ctx := context.Background()
61		st := storetest.New(t)
62		alice := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "alice", "")
63		bob := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "bob", "")
64		for i := 0; i < 5; i++ {
65			_, _ = st.WaterBalloons().Insert(ctx, alice.ID, alice.UserID, bob.ID, "msg", false)
66		}
67		if err := st.WaterBalloons().MarkAllReadFor(ctx, bob.ID); err != nil {
68			t.Fatalf("MarkAllReadFor: %v", err)
69		}
70		unread, _ := st.WaterBalloons().ListUnreadFor(ctx, bob.ID)
71		if len(unread) != 0 {
72			t.Errorf("after MarkAllReadFor: %d unread, want 0", len(unread))
73		}

76	// TestWaterBalloons_InboxOrdering checks that ListInboxFor returns unread
77	// before read, and within each group newest-first by id.
78	func TestWaterBalloons_InboxOrdering(t *testing.T) {
79		ctx := context.Background()
80		st := storetest.New(t)
81		alice := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "alice", "")
82		bob := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "bob", "")
83	
84		// Insert 4 in order, mark the second one read.
85		w1, _ := st.WaterBalloons().Insert(ctx, alice.ID, alice.UserID, bob.ID, "first",  false)
86		w2, _ := st.WaterBalloons().Insert(ctx, alice.ID, alice.UserID, bob.ID, "second", false)
87		w3, _ := st.WaterBalloons().Insert(ctx, alice.ID, alice.UserID, bob.ID, "third",  false)
88		w4, _ := st.WaterBalloons().Insert(ctx, alice.ID, alice.UserID, bob.ID, "fourth", false)
89		_ = st.WaterBalloons().MarkRead(ctx, w2.ID)
90		_ = w1
91		_ = w3
92		_ = w4
93	
94		got, err := st.WaterBalloons().ListInboxFor(ctx, bob.ID, 0)
95		if err != nil {
96			t.Fatalf("ListInboxFor: %v", err)
97		}
98		if len(got) != 4 {
99			t.Fatalf("got %d, want 4", len(got))
100		}
101		// Expected order: unread newest-first (w4, w3, w1), then read (w2).
102		wantBodies := []string{"fourth", "third", "first", "second"}
103		for i, w := range wantBodies {
104			if got[i].Body != w {
105				t.Errorf("[%d].Body = %q, want %q", i, got[i].Body, w)
106			}
107		}
108	}
109	
110	func TestWaterBalloons_DeliveredLiveFlag(t *testing.T) {
111		ctx := context.Background()
112		st := storetest.New(t)
113		alice := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "alice", "")
114		bob := storetest.MustUser(t, st, "bob", "")

117		offline, _ := st.WaterBalloons().Insert(ctx, alice.ID, alice.UserID, bob.ID, "offline", false)
118		if !live.DeliveredLive {
119			t.Error("live WB has DeliveredLive=false")
120		}
121		if offline.DeliveredLive {
122			t.Error("offline WB has DeliveredLive=true")
123		}
124	}
